# yii3-seo

Next.js-style typed SEO metadata for Yii3. One declarative `Metadata` object per
page; site-wide `MetadataDefaults` merged in. Namespace: `Rasuvaeff\Yii3Seo`.

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-seo
```

## Rules

- `SeoInjection` implements `MetaTagsInjectionInterface` + `LinkTagsInjectionInterface` — register it in `WebViewRenderer::injections`. Package DI also adds a service reset hook so request-local metadata does not leak in reusable runtimes.
- Call `setMetadata(Metadata)` per request (via `SeoMetadataEvent` from an action) before the renderer fires.
- `MetadataDefaults` is provided via the `rasuvaeff/yii3-seo` → `defaults` DI parameter; it is merged with the page `Metadata`.
- Title resolution: page `Title::of('X')` + defaults `Title::template('%s | Acme', default: 'Acme')` → `X | Acme`. `Title::absolute('X')` bypasses the template. No page title → defaults `default`.
- `metadataBase` (in defaults) resolves relative crawler-facing URLs: canonical, hreflang, `og:url`, `og:image`, `twitter:image`. Relative URL without base throws `InvalidArgumentException`. Icons/manifest are emitted as-is (browser-resolved).
- Fallback cascade (on by default): `og:title`/`og:description` ← page title/description; `twitter:title`/`description`/`image` ← OpenGraph. Explicit values win.
- Field merge: `openGraph`/`twitter` inherit unset fields from defaults; `applicationName`/`generator`/`themeColor`/`colorScheme`/`robots`/`icons`/`verification` are page-or-default; `jsonLd`/`other` concatenate defaults + page; `keywords`/`authors`/`creator`/`publisher`/`alternates`/`manifest` are page-only.
- `<title>` and JSON-LD are NOT injected — render via `getTitle()` and `getJsonLdHtml()` in layout.
- All URL/identifier validation throws `InvalidArgumentException` (message without trailing period).

## API

### Metadata (page object)

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Seo\Metadata;

new Metadata(
    title: 'Home',                 // string|Title; string -> Title::of()
    description: 'Desc',
    keywords: ['a', 'b'],
    authors: [new Author(name: 'Alice', url: 'https://example.com/alice')],
    applicationName: 'App', generator: 'Yii', creator: 'C', publisher: 'P',
    themeColor: '#fff', colorScheme: 'dark light',
    robots: Robots::index(),
    alternates: new Alternates(canonical: '/page', languages: ['en' => '/en']),
    openGraph: new OpenGraph(type: 'article', images: [new OgImage(url: '/og.jpg')]),
    twitter: new TwitterCard(card: 'summary_large_image', site: '@site'),
    icons: new Icons(icon: '/favicon.ico'),
    manifest: '/site.webmanifest',
    verification: new Verification(google: 'token'),
    jsonLd: [JsonLd::fromArray(['@type' => 'WebPage'])],
    other: [MetaTag::name('rating', 'general')],
)
```

### MetadataDefaults (site-wide, in params)

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Seo\MetadataDefaults;

new MetadataDefaults(
    metadataBase: 'https://example.com',     // validated absolute URL
    title: Title::template('%s | Acme', default: 'Acme'),
    applicationName: null, generator: null, themeColor: null, colorScheme: null,
    robots: null,
    openGraph: new OpenGraph(siteName: 'Acme', locale: 'en_US'),
    twitter: new TwitterCard(card: 'summary_large_image', site: '@acme'),
    icons: null, verification: null, jsonLd: [], other: [],
)
```

### Title

```php
Title::of('Home')                                  // template applied
Title::absolute('Home')                            // template bypassed
Title::template('%s | Acme', default: 'Acme')      // defaults only
```

### Alternates / OpenGraph / OgImage / TwitterCard

```php
new Alternates(canonical: '/page', languages: ['en' => '/en', 'x-default' => '/'])
new OpenGraph(title: null, description: null, type: null, url: '/p', siteName: 'S', locale: 'en_US', images: [/* OgImage */])  // type: null inherits defaults, renders og:type "website" if unset
new OgImage(url: '/og.jpg', width: 1200, height: 630, alt: 'Alt', type: 'image/jpeg')
new TwitterCard(card: null, site: '@s', creator: '@c', title: null, description: null, images: [])  // card: summary|summary_large_image|app|player; inherits defaults, renders "summary_large_image" if unset
```

### Robots

```php
Robots::index()        // index, follow
Robots::noindex(); Robots::nofollow(); Robots::none(); Robots::noarchive();
new Robots(['noindex', 'nosnippet'])
Robots::index()->withNoSnippet()->withNoImageIndex()
    ->withMaxSnippet(-1)->withMaxImagePreview('large')->withMaxVideoPreview(30)
    ->withGoogleBot('noindex')   // separate <meta name="googlebot">
```

### Icons / Verification / Author / MetaTag / JsonLd

```php
new Icons(icon: '/favicon.ico', shortcut: '/favicon.ico', apple: '/apple.png', other: [new Icon(rel: 'mask-icon', url: '/safari.svg')])
new Verification(google: 'g', yandex: 'y', bing: 'b', other: ['me' => 'm'])
new Author(name: 'Alice', url: 'https://example.com/alice')
MetaTag::name('rating', 'general'); MetaTag::property('fb:app_id', '123'); MetaTag::httpEquiv('x-ua-compatible', 'IE=edge');
JsonLd::fromArray(['@context' => 'https://schema.org', '@type' => 'WebPage'])
```

### SeoInjection

```php
$injection->setMetadata(Metadata $m): void
$injection->clear(): void
$injection->getTitle(): string          // resolved <title> for layout
$injection->getMetaTags(): list<Meta>   // auto-injected by WebViewRenderer
$injection->getLinkTags(): array<Link>  // auto-injected by WebViewRenderer
$injection->getJsonLdHtml(): string     // render in layout manually
```

### Event wiring

```php
// config/common/events.php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Seo\SeoMetadataEvent;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Seo\SetSeoMetadataEventHandler;

return [
    SeoMetadataEvent::class => [[SetSeoMetadataEventHandler::class, '__invoke']],
];

// In action: inject EventDispatcherInterface, dispatch
$this->eventDispatcher->dispatch(new SeoMetadataEvent(metadata: new Metadata(title: 'Home')));
```

### DI wiring

```php
// config/common/di.php
WebViewRenderer::class => [
    '__construct()' => [
        'injections' => [CsrfViewInjection::class, SeoInjection::class],
    ],
],
```

### Layout

```php
<title><?= htmlspecialchars($seoInjection->getTitle(), ENT_QUOTES) ?></title>
<?= $seoInjection->getJsonLdHtml() ?>
```
